name: llm-wiki
description: Consult and review against a plain-Markdown Obsidian knowledge vault (the 'LLM Wiki' pattern) — deep reference pages distilled from technical books, built for LLM consumption. Standalone: works with any vault laid out as wiki/{concepts,entities,sources,domains}/. Skills: knowledge-query, knowledge-review; agent: knowledge-researcher. Coverage is discovered from the vault, not hardcoded. Pairs with the pdf2wiki converter, which builds such a vault from PDFs.
